summary: missing final_prepare owner can synthesize pr_ready instead of returning typed waiting_for_runtime.
judgment_delta: canonical DAG, HEAD rebind persistence, resume authority, Gate SSOT and no legacy verify fallback pass.
final_prepare composition port violates the unconnected-owner contract.

findings.summary: When injected.final_prepare is absent, the wrapper defaults ownerResult to pr_ready; a ready Gate can therefore finish without a connected canonical owner.
findings.required_change: Preserve the unavailable(final_prepare) runner and add a regression test that expects waiting_for_runtime with missing_action_runner=final_prepare.
